siteInfo.name: KDS International Pvt. Ltd.
siteInfo.tagline: Most Trusted Manpower Services in Delhi & Staffing Partner
siteInfo.description: KDS International Pvt. Ltd. is a leading and established manpower provider located in Delhi, providing complete manpower solutions across many industries to deliver cost-effective and efficient workforce solutions.
siteInfo.address: D, 105, First Floor, 1/56, Lalita Park, Laxmi Nagar, Delhi, 110092

services.title: Skilled Manpower Services
services.shortDesc: Expert skilled workforce for specialised industrial roles — fitters, machine operators, technicians and more.
services.description: Our skilled manpower services cover a wide range of specialised industrial roles. We supply trained and experienced fitters, electricians, machine operators, supervisors, and technical staff who meet the highest industry standards. Every worker is vetted, background-checked, and ready to deploy.
benefits: Reduce recruitment time by up to 70%

content.text: The Precision Advantage in Technical Staffing

In today's highly competitive industrial landscape, the quality of your skilled workforce directly correlates with your operational output. At KDS International, we don't just supply workers; we provide precision-matched talent that integrates seamlessly into your production environment.

content.heading: Our Skilled Vetting Process
items: Advanced technical skill assessment and practical testing.
Complete background verification and reference checks.
Documentation audit (PF, ESIC, and certification validity).

content.text: Our fitters, electricians, and machine operators are trained to handle modern industrial equipment with care and efficiency, reducing downtime and maintaining high safety standards across your facility.

services.title: Unskilled Manpower Services
services.shortDesc: Reliable general-purpose labour for support, loading, cleaning and routine industrial tasks.
services.description: We supply well-trained, disciplined, and hardworking unskilled workers for general-purpose, labour-intensive processes. From loading and unloading to housekeeping and cleaning support, our unskilled manpower is ready for deployment with a committed attitude towards routine and support activities.
features: Available for daily or contract basis

content.text: Reliable Labor Support for Industrial Continuity

Every large-scale operation requires a reliable backbone of general-purpose labor. Our unskilled manpower services are designed to provide you with disciplined, hardworking, and well-managed workers for all your support activities.

content.heading: Why Our Labor Teams Stand Out
items: Strict adherence to shift timings and workplace discipline.
Basic safety training provided prior to deployment.
Rapid mobilization for loading/unloading and seasonal peaks.

content.text: We handle the entire administrative burden—from recruitment and onboarding to monthly payroll and compliance—allowing your core team to focus on production and growth.

services.title: Contract Based Manpower
services.shortDesc: Flexible contract staffing solutions — hire the right people for exactly as long as you need them.
services.description: We provide reliable and professional contract-based manpower solutions designed for project-specific or seasonal requirements. Our trained staff ensures seamless integration with your existing teams. Ideal for businesses that need short-term project workers without the administrative burden of permanent hires.

content.text: Flexible Staffing for Modern Business Challenges

Static workforce models are often ill-suited for businesses with fluctuating demand. Our contract-based manpower solutions offer the flexibility you need to scale your team up or down based on specific project timelines or seasonal requirements.

content.heading: Contract Management Benefits
items: Zero long-term liability for project-based staffing.
Standardized recruitment process for rapid onboarding.
Seamless transition between contract terms.

content.text: KDS International takes full responsibility for the workforce during the contract period, ensuring performance standards are met and all statutory requirements are fulfilled without any administrative overhead for you.

services.title: Semi-Skilled Manpower
services.shortDesc: Semi-skilled workers for packaging, logistics, production support and assembly-line operations.
services.description: Semi-skilled manpower is essential for packaging, production logistics, and industrial operations that require basic technical understanding with some monitoring. Our semi-skilled workforce bridges the gap between unskilled labour and fully specialised tradespeople — ideal for assembly lines, material handling, and quality support.

content.text: Semi-Skilled Workforce: The Operational Bridge

Our semi-skilled manpower services provide the perfect balance between general labor and specialized technicians. These workers are trained in basic machine operation, assembly line processes, and packaging logistics, ensuring smooth workflow transitions across your industrial floors.

content.heading: Our Semi-Skilled Competencies
items: Proficient in basic assembly and packaging line operation.
Trained for quality checking and production support.
Strong understanding of workplace safety and coordination.

services.title: Industrial Manpower Services
services.shortDesc: Specialised industrial workforce for factories, plants and heavy manufacturing operations.
services.description: We provide skilled and semi-skilled industrial manpower to ensure smooth factory and plant operations with maximum productivity. Our industrial workforce is trained to meet industry standards in safety, quality, and efficiency — helping your business maintain operational continuity in even the most demanding environments.

content.text: Specialized Industrial Workforce for High-Performance Plants

Operating a modern factory or manufacturing plant demands a workforce that understands technical complexity and safety protocols. KDS International supplies industrial manpower that is specifically trained for the demands of high-output environments.

content.heading: Industrial Deployment Expertise
items: Specialized machine operation and maintenance experience.
Adherence to stringent industrial safety and environmental standards.
24/7 workforce availability for multi-shift operations.

services.title: Labour Manpower Services
services.shortDesc: Reliable, hardworking and experienced workers for short-term projects or long-term assignments.
services.description: Our labour manpower solutions offer reliable, hardworking, and experienced workers for various sectors. Whether for short-term project requirements or long-term assignments, we supply the right people at the right time — ensuring your operations continue without disruption.

content.text: Project-Driven Labour Manpower Solutions

Whether it's construction projects, event logistics, or general site upkeep, our labour manpower services provide the hardworking individuals you need to get the job done. We specialize in supplying labor teams that are trained for versatility and reliability under high-pressure timelines.

content.heading: Our Labour Management Model
items: Scalable workforce for project-based demands.
Zero recruitment risk—we manage all onboarding processes.
Experienced on-site supervision for large labor teams.

industries.name: Manufacturing & Production
industries.desc: Complete manpower services for manufacturing plants to avoid any possible interruptions. We prepare all personnel trained for highly demanding industrial environments — from machine operators and fitters to helpers and maintenance staff, production supervisors and quality controllers.

industries.name: Warehousing, Logistics & E-commerce
industries.desc: The logistics industry requires speed, discipline, and accuracy. Our manpower teams handle packaging, loading and unloading, inventory management, and dispatch. Scale warehouse teams during peak seasons without worrying about recruitment or training.

industries.name: Construction & Infrastructure
industries.desc: KDS International provides qualified labour for every type of construction and civil infrastructure project. Our staff are trained in safety protocols, material handling, and basic site operations — minimising accident risks and ensuring timely project completion.

industries.name: Hospitality & Hotel Sector
industries.desc: A complete employment solution for hotels, restaurants, and catering companies. Housekeeping staff, kitchen assistants, or front office support — we provide personnel that are trained with the right approach and presentation skills for the hospitality sector.

industries.name: Healthcare & Hospitals
industries.desc: Reliability and discipline are most crucial in healthcare. We supply semi-skilled and unskilled manpower for hospitals, clinics, and healthcare facilities — trained for basic patient handling, sanitation, and infection control measures.

industries.name: Corporate Offices & IT Parks
industries.desc: Corporate clients rely on our manpower outsourcing for office assistance, housekeeping, and facility management. Reliable and discreet staff handle administrative and support tasks to maintain a clean and productive office environment.

whyChooseUs.title: Time-Efficient Manpower Response
whyChooseUs.desc: Extensive database of workers who can be mobilised within 24-48 hours for any project or industry requirement.

whyChooseUs.title: All Categories of Labour Covered
whyChooseUs.desc: From unskilled labour supply to skilled manpower services — everything under one roof with one reliable partner.

whyChooseUs.title: Compliance & Transparency
whyChooseUs.desc: Total monitoring of all statutory obligations — PF, ESIC, and wage documentation — with full transparency and auditability.

whyChooseUs.title: Backup & Replacement Ready
whyChooseUs.desc: 24/7 standby teams of workers and supervisors ensure your operations continue uninterrupted without delays.

whyChooseUs.title: Deep Industrial Expertise
whyChooseUs.desc: We understand the dynamics across several industries and provide well-trained, reliable manpower that can perform.

whyChooseUs.title: Value for Money
whyChooseUs.desc: Best-in-class manpower outsourcing at competitive rates — reducing your recruitment, training, and compliance costs.

projects.title: Large-Scale Factory Manpower — Auto Parts Manufacturer
projects.description: Supplied 150+ skilled workers including fitters, machine operators, and production supervisors for a major auto parts manufacturer in Delhi NCR — fully deployed within 72 hours.

projects.title: E-commerce Warehouse Staffing — Seasonal Peak
projects.description: Scaled a warehouse team from 30 to 200 workers during festive season peak for a leading e-commerce company. Managed all compliance, attendance, and payroll in-house.

projects.title: Hospital Support Staff — Healthcare Facility
projects.description: Placed 60+ trained support staff — ward boys, sanitation workers, and patient attendants — for a 300-bed hospital in Delhi, maintaining 100% attendance compliance.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.role: HR Manager, AutoParts India Pvt. Ltd.
testimonials.content: KDS International supplied us with 120 skilled workers within 48 hours when our production line needed urgent support. Outstanding reliability and compliance management.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.content: We have been working with KDS for 3 years for our warehouse staffing. They always deliver on time, with full compliance on PF and ESIC. Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Dr. Anil Mehta
testimonials.content: Sourcing trained support staff for a healthcare environment is challenging. KDS International understood our requirements and delivered trained, disciplined workers promptly.

team.name: Managing Director
team.bio: Leading the company since inception with a passion for connecting businesses with the right workforce solutions across Delhi NCR.

team.name: Operations Head
team.bio: Expert in manpower logistics, compliance management, and workforce planning across industrial and corporate sectors.

team.name: Compliance Manager
team.bio: Ensures all statutory requirements including PF, ESIC, and labour law compliance are met with complete transparency.

aboutPage.mission: To be Delhi NCR's most trusted manpower solutions partner — connecting skilled, semi-skilled, and unskilled workers with businesses that need reliable, compliant, and performance-driven staffing.
aboutPage.vision: To build a world where every business has access to the right workforce at the right time, with zero compliance burden and maximum operational efficiency.
aboutPage.history: KDS International Pvt. Ltd. is an established manpower provider located in Laxmi Nagar, Delhi. Over the years, the company has demonstrated its dependability by supplying organisations of all sizes with a workforce that is of high character, skill, and professionalism. From temporary manpower to staff outsourcing and workforce supply, we cover all manpower requirements under one roof.

whyUs.title: 24-48 Hour Deployment
whyUs.desc: Mobilise workers within 24-48 hours for any project requirement through our extensive talent database.

whyUs.title: Full Compliance Management
whyUs.desc: PF, ESIC, wage documentation and all statutory requirements fully managed and auditable.

whyUs.title: All Labour Categories
whyUs.desc: Skilled, semi-skilled, unskilled, contract, industrial, and labour — all manpower types under one roof.

whyUs.title: Zero Disruption Guarantee
whyUs.desc: Standby teams and backup workers ensure your operations never slow down.

sections.title: Introduction
content: KDS International Pvt. Ltd. ('we', 'our', or 'us') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our manpower services. Please read this privacy policy carefully. If you do not agree with the terms of this privacy policy, please do not access the site or use our services.
Please read this privacy policy carefully. If you do not agree with the terms of this privacy policy, please do not access the site or use our services.
Your privacy is important to us, and we are dedicated to protecting your personal information and being transparent about how we use it.
Your privacy is important to us, and we are dedicated to protecting your personal information and being transparent about how we use it.

sections.title: Information We Collect
content: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you express an interest in obtaining information about us or our services, when you participate in activities on the website, or otherwise when you contact us. The personal information we collect may include:
Please read this privacy policy carefully. If you do not agree with the terms of this privacy policy, please do not access the site or use our services.
Your privacy is important to us, and we are dedicated to protecting your personal information and being transparent about how we use it.
Your privacy is important to us, and we are dedicated to protecting your personal information and being transparent about how we use it.
listItems: Name and contact details (email address, phone number, company name)
Professional information (job title, industry, company size)
Workforce requirements and staffing needs
Communication preferences
Identification documents for employment verification
Bank account details for payroll processing (for placed workers)

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect or receive:
listItems: To facilitate manpower services and workforce deployment
To process payroll and manage statutory compliance (PF, ESIC, etc.)
To send you updates about our services and industry insights
To respond to your inquiries and provide customer support
To improve our website and service offerings
To comply with legal obligations and regulatory requirements
To protect against fraud and unauthorized transactions

sections.title: Legal Basis for Processing
sections.content: We process your personal information based on the following legal grounds:
listItems: Contract performance: To fulfill our manpower service agreements
Legal compliance: To meet statutory requirements (PF, ESIC, labour laws)
Legitimate interests: To improve our services and prevent fraud
Consent: When you have explicitly agreed to receive marketing communications

sections.title: Information Sharing and Disclosure
sections.content: We may share your information with:
listItems: Government authorities for statutory compliance (PF, ESIC departments)
Banking partners for payroll processing
Legal advisors for compliance and dispute resolution
Service providers who assist in website operations and business functions
Potential business partners during mergers or acquisitions
sections.note: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this privacy policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law. For placed workers, we retain employment records as mandated by Indian labour laws. For client inquiries, we retain contact information for up to 5 years to maintain business relationships.

sections.title: Your Data Protection Rights
sections.content: Under applicable Indian data protection laws, you have the following rights:
listItems: Right to access your personal information
Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete data
Right to request deletion of your data (subject to legal obligations)
Right to restrict or object to processing
Right to data portability
Right to withdraw consent at any time
sections.note: To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@kdsinternational.org

sections.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze website traffic, and understand user behavior. You can control cookies through your browser settings. Third-party services like Google Analytics may also use cookies to collect anonymous usage data.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These include:
listItems: Encrypted data transmission (SSL/TLS)
Secure servers and access controls
Regular security assessments
Employee training on data protection
Physical security at our Delhi office

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites, plugins, or services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies before providing any personal information.

sections.title: Children's Privacy
sections.content: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a minor without verification of parental consent, we will take steps to delete that information.

sections.title: International Data Transfers
sections.content: As a company operating primarily in India, your information is generally processed and stored within India. However, some service providers may process data in other countries. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for any international transfers.

sections.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, legal requirements, or operational needs. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the updated policy on this page with a revised 'Last Updated' date.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

contactDetails.address: D, 105, First Floor, 1/56, Lalita Park, Laxmi Nagar, Delhi, 110092

privacyPolicy.disclaimer: This Privacy Policy applies to all information collected through our website and during the course of our manpower services, unless otherwise specified.

sections.title: Introduction
content: Welcome to KDS International Pvt. Ltd. These Terms and Conditions govern your use of our website and services. By accessing our website or engaging our manpower services, you agree to be bound by these terms.
Please read these terms carefully before using our services. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not access the website or use our services.
KDS International Pvt. Ltd. ('KDS', 'we', 'our', or 'us') reserves the right to modify these terms at any time without prior notice.

sections.title: Definitions
sections.content: For the purpose of these Terms and Conditions:
listItems: 'Company', 'We', 'Us', 'Our' refers to KDS International Pvt. Ltd., registered at D, 105, First Floor, 1/56, Lalita Park, Laxmi Nagar, Delhi, 110092.
'Client', 'You', 'Your' refers to the individual or organization engaging our manpower services or accessing our website.
'Services' refers to all manpower solutions including skilled, semi-skilled, unskilled, contract-based, industrial, and labour supply services.
'Workers' refers to individuals provided by KDS to clients for various roles.
'Website' refers to https://www.kdsinternational.org

sections.title: Services Agreement
content: KDS International provides manpower recruitment and staffing services to businesses across various industries.
All service engagements are subject to separate Service Agreements or Contracts that will be signed between KDS and the Client.
In the absence of a formal agreement, these Terms and Conditions shall govern the relationship.
KDS reserves the right to accept or refuse any service request at its sole discretion.

sections.title: Client Obligations
sections.content: Clients engaging our services agree to:
listItems: Provide accurate and complete information about workforce requirements
Ensure a safe working environment for all deployed workers as per Indian labour laws
Comply with all applicable laws, regulations, and industry standards
Provide timely feedback on worker performance
Notify KDS immediately of any issues, grievances, or incidents involving deployed workers
Maintain confidentiality of all KDS proprietary information
Pay all agreed fees within the specified payment terms

sections.title: KDS Obligations
sections.content: KDS International agrees to:
listItems: Provide qualified workers as per client specifications and requirements
Conduct background verification and document checks on all deployed workers
Manage statutory compliance including PF, ESIC, and other applicable regulations
Provide replacement workers in case of absenteeism or non-performance as per agreement
Maintain confidentiality of client information
Ensure workers adhere to client workplace policies and code of conduct

sections.title: Payment Terms
content: All service fees are outlined in the Service Agreement or invoice provided to the client.
Payment terms are typically 30 days from invoice date unless otherwise specified.
Late payments may incur interest at 2% per month on outstanding amounts.
KDS reserves the right to suspend services for non-payment after written notice.
All applicable taxes (GST, etc.) will be charged separately as per government regulations.
sections.note: Special payment terms may be negotiated for long-term contracts or high-volume engagements.

sections.title: Worker Conduct and Performance
content: KDS takes reasonable steps to ensure workers are qualified and suitable for assigned roles.
Clients are responsible for day-to-day supervision, training, and direction of workers.
If a worker's performance is unsatisfactory, client must notify KDS in writing within 7 days.
KDS will make reasonable efforts to replace unsatisfactory workers within a reasonable timeframe.
KDS is not liable for worker misconduct, negligence, or willful acts once deployed at client premises.

sections.title: Compliance and Statutory Requirements
sections.content: KDS International ensures compliance with:
listItems: The Contract Labour (Regulation and Abolition) Act, 1970
Employees' Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952
Employees' State Insurance Act, 1948
Payment of Wages Act, 1936
Minimum Wages Act, 1948
Equal Remuneration Act, 1976
All applicable state-specific labour laws
sections.note: Clients must ensure compliance with workplace safety laws including the Factories Act, 1948 and Building and Other Construction Workers Act, 1996 where applicable.

sections.title: Indemnification
sections.content: The Client agrees to indemnify and hold harmless KDS International, its directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, and expenses arising from:
listItems: Client's breach of these Terms and Conditions
Client's violation of any applicable law or regulation
Client's negligence or willful misconduct
Any third-party claims related to client's use of our services
Workplace accidents or injuries occurring at client premises

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, KDS International's total liability to the Client shall not exceed the total fees paid by the Client for services during the preceding 12 months.
KDS shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
KDS is not responsible for any loss of business, profits, revenue, or data.
KDS does not warrant that services will be uninterrupted or error-free.

sections.title: Confidentiality
sections.content: Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality regarding:
listItems: Business strategies, operations, and financial information
Client lists and supplier information
Technical data, processes, and intellectual property
Worker information and payroll details
Terms of service agreements and pricing
sections.note: Confidentiality obligations survive termination of the service agreement for a period of 3 years.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
content: All content on the KDS website including text, graphics, logos, images, and software is the property of KDS International and protected by Indian copyright laws.
Clients may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works without prior written consent.
KDS trademarks and trade dress may not be used without express written permission.

sections.title: Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate services:
listItems: By providing written notice as specified in the Service Agreement
Immediately if the other party breaches material terms and fails to cure within 15 days
If the other party becomes insolvent or files for bankruptcy
For convenience with 30 days written notice (subject to applicable termination fees)

sections.title: Force Majeure
sections.content: KDS International shall not be liable for any failure or delay in performance due to circumstances beyond its reasonable control, including but not limited to:
listItems: Acts of God (natural disasters, earthquakes, floods, pandemics)
War, terrorism, civil unrest, or government actions
Labour strikes or industrial disputes
Power outages, internet failures, or technical disruptions
Supply chain disruptions affecting worker availability

sections.title: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
content: These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India.
Any disputes arising out of or in connection with these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Delhi.
Before initiating legal proceedings, parties agree to attempt good-faith negotiations to resolve disputes.
If negotiations fail, disputes may be referred to arbitration in Delhi as per the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996.

sections.title: Website Usage Terms
sections.content: When using our website, you agree to:
listItems: Not use the website for any unlawful purpose
Not attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
Not interfere with the website's functionality or security
Not upload viruses or malicious code
Not scrape, crawl, or copy content without permission
Provide accurate information when filling forms or inquiries

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. KDS International:
listItems: Is not responsible for the content or accuracy of third-party sites
Does not endorse or warrant any products or services offered through third-party links
Is not liable for any damages arising from third-party interactions
Encourages users to review third-party terms and privacy policies

sections.title: Modifications to Terms
content: KDS International reserves the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time.
Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on the website.
Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of modified terms.
Clients are responsible for regularly reviewing these terms.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.content: For questions, concerns, or notices regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:

contactDetails.address: D, 105, First Floor, 1/56, Lalita Park, Laxmi Nagar, Delhi, 110092

termsAndConditions.disclaimer: These Terms and Conditions constitute the entire agreement between KDS International and the Client regarding the use of our services and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.

careerData.title: Senior Project Manager
careerData.description: Lead large-scale government infrastructure projects from initiation to completion
responsibilities: Ensure timely delivery within budget constraints
Lead project teams and conduct regular reviews
requirements: 10+ years of experience in project management

careerData.title: Site Engineer - Civil
careerData.description: Oversee on-site construction activities for government building projects
responsibilities: Ensure quality control and safety standards
requirements: Knowledge of construction methods and materials

careerData.title: Electrical Engineer
careerData.description: Handle electrical systems design and implementation for government facilities
requirements: Knowledge of electrical codes and standards

careerData.title: Contracts Manager
careerData.description: Manage contracts, tenders, and legal compliance for government projects

careerData.title: Safety Officer

responsibilities: Investigate incidents and recommend corrective actions

careerData.title: Quantity Surveyor
careerData.description: Handle cost estimation, billing, and quantity takeoffs for government projects
responsibilities: Handle client billing and vendor payments

careerData.title: IT Infrastructure Engineer
